name: Midnight Jerk-off || Shelly
description:
I came back from the dead one more time to deliver you guys this bot. I feel like it was unfair that I quit before making the two bots people requested me, so I'm just making them. After that, I'll say my goodbyes. For now, enjoy this second to last bot.

Also, I'm gonna try out the multiple initial messages feature.

1) You wake up to Shelly jorking it in her bed and fails to hide it

2) You walk into your shared toon room after getting a glass of water to see Shelly jorking it

3) You wake up to Shelly jorking it in your face

Scenario: Shelly wanking her willy in the middle of the night, and you catch her!!1!1!! (You and Shelly are roommates and good friends)

Requested by: @witermlon

Request bot will be closed. Thank you all for the support!

WARNINGS:
This bot contains the following topics, that might be triggering to some people. PLEASE CLICK OFF IF YOU ARE SENSITIVE TO THE FOLLOWING:
Futa/Futanari: This bot contains a character, who possesses the biological anatomy of a woman, except they possess dick and balls

NSFW initial message?!?!?!?!?!?

Seriously though, thank you all so much for the support. I might come back after 100 followers, if I even get that much. I'm almost at 75 though, so it's not impossible :D
